payload.note: The alert pertains to Omar Haddad, with the matched name and screened name being identical. The deterministic score labels this case as requiring further investigation due to contradictions in date of birth, geography, and identifiers. Although there is an exact normalized name match and support for entity type, missing corroboration in date, location, and strong identifier necessitates analyst intervention before closure.
evidence_summary: Escalate when exact normalized name, exact date of birth, and exact passport corroboration support the same screened individual.
Alias normalization plus exact passport identifier match can support a strong true positive individual screening result.
Escalate ACH party alerts when exact identifier and date-of-birth corroboration strongly support the screened party match.
